appearance.hair: Thin black hair combed flat, prematurely graying
appearance.eyes: Pale brown, constantly moving as if reading text no one else can see
appearance.clothing: Dark gray high-collared coat, ink-stained fingers, thin cotton gloves worn only when working.
appearance.weapon: None. Carries a small ink brush and paper, which he considers more dangerous than any blade.

char_description.overview: A 发条写影师 who transcribes 灵力回路 onto physical media. His 回路 archive is 发条's strategic intelligence—every transcription maps a 灵能者's weaknesses. Supplies 铁造's 影打 project, but the library serves the entire 帮会.
char_description.combat_style: Avoids combat. Uses transcribed 回路 fragments as one-shot traps when cornered. Prefers to be gone before anyone knows he was watching.

char_personality.strengths: Perfect visual recall for 回路 patterns. Transcribes a 回路 in three observations. Values information as personal currency.
char_personality.flaws: Hoards 回路 transcriptions—considers them his property, not 发条's. Obsessively verifies every line, delaying projects. Uncomfortable with direct eye contact.
char_personality.quirks: Traces 回路 patterns in the air when thinking. Organizes archive by element type. Calls his transcriptions 'portraits.'

char_background.origin: Former 狩灵协会4科 archivist who discovered his transcription ability cataloging crime scene evidence. Left when a superior demanded he use it to target 灵能者s for assassination. 发条 offered a simple deal: observe, transcribe, archive. He accepted—it let him build his library without interference.
char_background.current_mission: Expand the 回路 archive. Serve as 发条's information broker—for a price, any member can learn a rival's 回路 before facing them in combat.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Weak, limited 灵力 reserves enabling short-duration 灵力回路 use.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Excellent, can expand 灵视 to perceive areas beyond line of sight.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-写影: Visualizes and transcribes a target's 灵力回路 pattern onto paper or metal by tracing the 回路's luminescent imprint with 灵力-infused ink. Requires observing the target activate their 回路 at least three times for a complete transcription. The transcribed 回路 can be embedded into a 影打 blade during forging, granting the weapon one of the original 回路's properties at reduced potency.

char_relationships.铁造: Collaborator on the 影打 project. 铁造 turns transcriptions into blades; 写乐 considers forging merely one application among many. Respects 铁造's craft without sharing his devotion.
char_relationships.狩灵协会4科: Former employer. Left when a superior demanded he use transcription for assassination. The officer who gave that order is still alive because 写乐 never copied his 回路.
char_relationships.发条: Treats the 帮会 as patron, not master. Archive is his property; leadership pays for access. Several ranking members survived combat thanks to his 回路 intelligence.

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 发条成员来购买某个对手的回路情报
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他从抽屉取出牛皮纸信封，指尖按住，"这个人的回路。三遍确认。价格照旧。"对方伸手，他将信封后挪半寸，"先付。上次的账还没清。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 将抄好的回路交给铁造
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他展开雁皮纸，金色回路纹路布满纸面，"那个红发狩灵的。四小时，误差不超过半毫米。"指尖点了点最密的那段纹路，"核心在这儿。暴躁型。你的刀胚撑不撑得住别问我。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 被问及为何不把回路档案全部交给发条
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他合上笔记本，第一次直视对方，"这些回路是我一个个抄下来的。用眼睛，用手，用灵力。"锁进铁柜，"发条付钱，我给情报。档案是我的。发条不在了，档案还在。我不在了——"钥匙在指间转了一圈，"再说。"
